hypothesis: If the integrated workflow combining thermodynamic databases, cellular automata reaction simulations, machine-learning feasibility descriptors, and commercial pricing is applied to design Ca2SiO4 synthesis from commercially available reactants at 800–1600°C, then the top-ranked recipes will experimentally yield high-purity Ca2SiO4 at lower total reactant cost than conventional heuristic routes because coupling reaction likelihood with market constraints prioritizes thermodynamically optimal and economically efficient pathways.
